Class JdbcCustomConversions.JdbcConverterConfigurer

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.jdbc.core.convert.JdbcCustomConversions.JdbcConverterConfigurer
Enclosing class:
JdbcCustomConversions
public static class JdbcCustomConversions.JdbcConverterConfigurer extends Object
JdbcCustomConversions.JdbcConverterConfigurer encapsulates creation of CustomConversions.ConverterConfiguration with JDBC specifics.
Since:
4.0
Author:
Mark Paluch

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    JdbcCustomConversions.JdbcConverterConfigurer
    registerConverter(Converter<?,?> converter)
    Add a custom Converter implementation.
    JdbcCustomConversions.JdbcConverterConfigurer

    Add a custom ConverterFactory implementation.
    JdbcCustomConversions.JdbcConverterConfigurer
    registerConverters(Object... converters)
    Add converters, factories, converter-aware objects, and generic converters.
    JdbcCustomConversions.JdbcConverterConfigurer

    Add converters, factories, converter-aware objects, and generic converters.

  • Method Details

    • registerConverter

      @Contract("_ -> this") public JdbcCustomConversions.JdbcConverterConfigurer registerConverter(Converter<?,?> converter)
      Add a custom Converter implementation.
      Parameters:
      converter - must not be null.
      Returns:
      this.

    • registerConverters

      @Contract("_ -> this") public JdbcCustomConversions.JdbcConverterConfigurer registerConverters(Object... converters)
      Add converters, factories, converter-aware objects, and generic converters.
      Parameters:
      converters - must not be null nor contain null values.
      Returns:
      this.

    • registerConverters

      @Contract("_ -> this") public JdbcCustomConversions.JdbcConverterConfigurer registerConverters(Collection<?> converters)
      Add converters, factories, converter-aware objects, and generic converters.
      Parameters:
      converters - must not be null nor contain null values.
      Returns:
      this.

    • registerConverterFactory

      @Contract("_ -> this") public JdbcCustomConversions.JdbcConverterConfigurer registerConverterFactory(ConverterFactory<?,?> converterFactory)
      Add a custom ConverterFactory implementation.
      Parameters:
      converterFactory - must not be null.
      Returns:
      this.
